strategy: Grendelynn keeps a 75% Intercept Shadow Sentinel on King Borr, so single-target hits get soaked. Use AoE to hit past it.
Do not kill Grendelynn first; King Borr revives her at 100% health and she re-casts the Sentinel. Kill Borr through AoE or drop both in the same round.
Feint triggers an AoE Cleanse Ward, so skip Feint or protect it with Indemnity; blade-only setup is cleaner.
Blade up and AoE with Storm (+15%, resists Myth 50%).
cheatNotes: Latecomers get hit with Medusa, so join on Round 1.
Grendelynn's Shadow Sentinel intercepts 75% of single-target hits on Borr; use AoE to reach him.
Feinting Borr makes him AoE Cleanse Ward it off, so skip Feint or protect it with Indemnity.
Killing Grendelynn before Borr fully heals her and she re-Sentinels, so take Borr down with AoE instead.
